train_command: uv run python -m harness.run_cascade --experiment-id c0_cascade_default --seed 1729 --config configs/c0_cascade_default.json
notes: DSPy optimizer-search cascade: tested bootstrap/copro/mipro/simba; MIPROv2 won val_exact_acc=0.895; LoRA distilled the MIPRO program (instructions+demos) on the base unsloth Gemma. SIMBA prompt + DEMOS in protocol.py replaced with MIPRO outputs.
